//go:build integration
// +build integration

package admin_server_test

import (
	"context"
	"testing"

	"connectrpc.com/connect"

	pb "example.com/proj/gen/services/admin_server/v1"
	admin_serverv1connect "example.com/proj/gen/services/admin_server/v1/admin_serverv1connect"
	"example.com/proj/pkg/app"
)

func TestIntegration(t *testing.T) {
	t.Parallel()

	_, client := app.NewTestAdminServerServer(t)
	ctx := context.Background()

	tests := []struct {
		name string
		call func(client admin_serverv1connect.AdminServerServiceClient) error
	}{
		{
			name: "Create",
			call: func(c admin_serverv1connect.AdminServerServiceClient) error {
				_, err := c.Create(ctx, connect.NewRequest(&pb.CreateRequest{}))
				return err
			},
		},
		{
			name: "List",
			call: func(c admin_serverv1connect.AdminServerServiceClient) error {
				_, err := c.List(ctx, connect.NewRequest(&pb.ListRequest{}))
				return err
			},
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			t.Parallel()
			err := tt.call(client)
			if err != nil {
				t.Logf("%s returned error: %v", tt.name, err)
			}
		})
	}
}
